final:
module RefModule (
    input [15:0] data_in,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16 x 16-bit SRAM cells

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule
